semantic_desc: The user is referring to Landsat-series optical imagery, typically medium-resolution multispectral data suitable for long-term land-surface change analysis.
The user explicitly requests Landsat 8 imagery, commonly used for land-cover mapping, change detection, and time-series analysis.
A common shorthand for Landsat 8, corresponding to mainstream Landsat 8 optical imagery products.
A Landsat 8 product-code style query, often used by professional or script-oriented users.
A Landsat 9 product-code style query, often used by professional or script-oriented users.
A common shorthand for Landsat 9 optical imagery products, including winter-scene imagery where available.
A common wording for Landsat 9 optical imagery products, including winter-scene imagery where available.
A seasonal keyword pointing to Landsat 9 winter imagery or winter-scene selection.
The user is referring to Sentinel-series optical satellite imagery, usually Sentinel-2 high-resolution multispectral land-observation data.
The user explicitly requests Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery for land-cover, vegetation, water, or similar analysis.
A common shorthand for Sentinel-2 MSI multispectral optical imagery.
The user is referring to Sentinel-series optical satellite imagery, usually Sentinel-2 high-resolution multispectral land-observation data.
The user explicitly requests Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery for land-cover, vegetation, water, or similar analysis.
The user is referring to MODIS data, typically for large-area, long-term environmental or vegetation monitoring.
The user wants to use MODIS data for vegetation monitoring or ecological-change analysis.
An entry point for NDVI calculation or analysis tasks, corresponding to products suitable for NDVI computation such as MODIS surface reflectance.
The user is referring to digital elevation model data for terrain analysis, hydrological modeling, or spatial correction.
The user requests 30 m DEM data, corresponding here to the ASTER GDEM global elevation product.
The user directly refers to ASTER GDEM, a global 30 m elevation product.
The user wants globally covered elevation data, corresponding here to ASTER GDEM.
The user refers broadly to Chinese Gaofen satellite data, usually medium- to high-resolution optical imagery.
The user explicitly requests Gaofen-1 imagery, corresponding here to its ARD surface-reflectance product.
The user explicitly requests Gaofen-2 imagery, corresponding here to Level-1 optical remote-sensing imagery with basic radiometric/geometric processing.
The user wants preprocessed, analysis-ready surface-reflectance data, corresponding here to the GF-1 ARD product.
The user wants domestic Chinese optical satellite data for remote-sensing analysis, here mainly pointing to Gaofen-1 ARD products.
The user refers to high-resolution Wuhan-1 satellite data, corresponding to 0.5 m panchromatic imagery.
A colloquial reference to the Luojia satellite series, usually Wuhan-1 / Luojia-3 02 high-resolution imagery.
The user explicitly requests 0.5 m high-resolution imagery for fine mapping, target recognition, or emergency monitoring.
The user wants high-spatial-resolution panchromatic optical imagery, corresponding here to Wuhan-1 0.5 m panchromatic products.
